_readme: Copy this file to settings.json and fill in your own API key(s). settings.json is gitignored — never commit it. Every value can also be set via environment variables (see config.py for the WCAG_* names). You can also configure everything from the in-app Settings page.
_option_1_single_cloud_provider: Simplest setup: one provider for everything. Set ai_backend to gemini | openai | anthropic | openrouter, add your key, done. Vision, judge, and video roles default to the same endpoint.
_option_2_mixed_providers: Optionally split roles across providers — e.g. a cheap text model plus a multimodal model for screenshots/video. Uncomment and fill these in:
_option_3_fully_local: Run everything on your own hardware: set ai_backend to vllm and point the URLs at your local OpenAI-compatible servers (vLLM, llama.cpp, LM Studio, Ollama...). No API key needed.
_embeddings: Used for cross-page dedup and consistency checks. Default expects a local Ollama at localhost:11434 with bge-m3; or point at any OpenAI-compatible /embeddings endpoint with embeddings_format = openai.
_whisper: Audio transcription for caption verification. Formats: local (faster-whisper server), openai (/audio/transcriptions), or gemini (native multimodal).
